Title: Hidden Inventory: Part 4
Actors: Aya Endô, Jun'ya Enoki, Hiroko Kiso
Plot: "Let's go home, Riko-chan." The moment Geto extends a hand to Amanai, the worst that could possibly happen does. Geto is left dumbstruck as Toji Fushiguro makes his appearance. Toji then declares that he killed Satoru Gojo.
